name: Almond Ginger Biscotti
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Whole blanched almonds; Toasted; coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients in a large bowl and stir well to mix.
2. Beat the margarine and sugar with an electric mixer on medium speed for about 2 minutes, or until soft and creamy.
3. Add the egg beaters and almond extract; beat well to combine.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients, stirring just until blended.
5. Stir in the almonds and crystallized ginger.
6. Form the dough into two 12 x 2-1/2-inch logs and place them 4 inches apart on a baking sheet coated with cooking spray.
7. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Let cool on wire racks for 15 minutes.
8. Using a serrated knife, slice the logs diagonally into twelve 1-inch-thick slices.
9. Place the slices on an ungreased baking sheet and bake at 350°F for 12 to 15 minutes on each side, or until golden brown. Let cool on wire racks.
Yield: Approximately 3-1/2 dozen (92 calories per serving).
